sentences.arabic: يَكْتَسِي شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ طَابَعًا خَاصًّا فِيمَا يَتَعَلَّقُ بِالْمَائِدَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ تَجْتَمِعُ الْأُسَرُ لِتَنَاوُلِ وَجْبَةِ الْإِفْطَارِ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ مِنَ الصِّيَامِ.
sentences.translation: Mjesec ramazan poprima poseban karakter kada je u pitanju arapska trpeza, jer se porodice okupljaju na iftaru nakon dana posta.
sentences.translationEn: The month of Ramadan takes on a special character regarding the Arab table, as families gather to have the Iftar meal after a day of fasting.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الْوَجْبَةُ عَادَةً بِتَنَاوُلِ حَبَّاتِ التَّمْرِ وَالْمَاءِ، تَمَاشِيًا مَعَ السُّنَّةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ وَلِتَهْيِئَةِ الْمَعِدَةِ لِلطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Obrok obično počinje konzumiranjem hurmi i vode, u skladu sa sunnetom Poslanika i radi pripreme želuca za hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The meal usually begins with eating dates and water, in accordance with the Prophetic Sunnah and to prepare the stomach for food.

sentences.arabic: تَتَصَدَّرُ الشُّورَبَاتُ السَّاخِنَةُ، وَخَاصَّةً شُورَبَةَ الْعَدَسِ، قَائِمَةَ الْمُقَبِّلَاتِ لِفَوَائِدِهَا الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الْجَمَّةِ بَعْدَ سَاعَاتِ الِانْقِطَاعِ عَنِ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Vruće čorbe, a posebno čorba od leće, nalaze se na vrhu liste predjela zbog svojih ogromnih nutritivnih prednosti nakon sati bez jela.
sentences.translationEn: Hot soups, especially lentil soup, top the list of appetizers because of their vast nutritional benefits after hours of abstaining from food.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَخْلُو الْمَائِدَةُ مِنَ الْقَطَايِفِ، وَهِيَ حَلْوِيَّاتٌ مَحْشُوَّةٌ بِالْجُبْنِ أَوِ الْمُكَسَّرَاتِ، تُعَدُّ خِصِّيصًا لِهَذَا الشَّهْرِ الْفَضِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Trpeza nije potpuna bez kataifa, a to su poslastice punjene sirom ili orašastim plodovima, koje se pripremaju posebno za ovaj sveti mjesec.
sentences.translationEn: The table is never without Qatayef, which are sweets stuffed with cheese or nuts, prepared specifically for this holy month.

sentences.arabic: تَعْكِسُ هَذِهِ الْأَطْبَاقُ مَعَانِيَ الصَّبْرِ وَالشُّكْرِ، وَتُحَوِّلُ تَنَاوُلَ الطَّعَامِ إِلَى تَجْرِبَةٍ رُوحَانِيَّةٍ وَاجْتِمَاعِيَّةٍ عَمِيقَةِ الْأَثَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ova jela odražavaju značenja strpljenja i zahvalnosti, te pretvaraju objedovanje u duhovno i društveno iskustvo dubokog utjecaja.
sentences.translationEn: These dishes reflect the meanings of patience and gratitude, and turn eating into a spiritual and social experience of deep impact.
